questions: what is the capital of India?
what is the capital of Bangladesh?
what is the main export of Bangladesh?
what is the currency of Bangladesh?
what is the currency of India?
what is the largest country in the world?
who is the father of the nation of Bangladesh?
answers: The capital of India is New Delhi. It is located in northern India and serves as the seat of the Indian government. New Delhi is one of the most populous cities in the world.
Bangladesh er capital holo Dhaka. Dhaka is one of the most densely populated cities in the world and serves as the economic, political, and cultural center of Bangladesh.
Bangladesh er main export holo readymade garments (RMG). Bangladesh is the second-largest garment exporter in the world, contributing significantly to its economy.
Dhaka is in Bangladesh. It is the capital and largest city of Bangladesh, situated on the banks of the Buriganga River.
Bangladesh er currency holo Bangladeshi Taka (BDT). India er currency holo Indian Rupee (INR). Both are used as legal tender in their respective countries.
Russia is the largest country in the world by area, covering over 17 million square kilometers. It spans across Europe and Asia, making it a transcontinental country.
There are 7 continents in the world: Asia, Africa, North America, South America, Antarctica, Europe, and Australia/Oceania. Asia is the largest by both area and population.
The father of the nation of Bangladesh is Bangabandhu Sheikh Mujibur Rahman. He led the independence movement and played a key role in the liberation of Bangladesh in 1971.
